⚔️ Battle Setup

1. Click Generate to create your connection offer. Send the code to your opponent.
2. Paste their answer code here:
1. Paste the host's offer code:
2. Send this answer code back to the host:
⏳ Waiting for host to connect...

⚔️ Choose Initiative Type

As host, you set how initiative works for this battle.

⚓ Group

Each side organises ships into formations. All ships in a formation share one initiative roll. Smaller formations go first on ties.

🚢 Single

Every individual ship rolls its own d20 initiative. Ships activate in descending order.

🏴 None

No initiative. Free-form combat — both sides act without a turn order.

⚓ Organise Your Formations

Assign each ship to a formation. Ships in the same formation share one initiative roll.
